title: Text substitution does not work in `sysctl.md`
body:
### Issue Description The option documentation for `--sysctl` contains the line https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/dac8c35dd6fecdd1ea9bb4baf83f8600747fa875/docs/source/markdown/options/sysctl.md?plain=1#L25 It is rendered as ```

Note: , the above sysctls are not allowed.

``` which can be seen by running curl ``` $ curl -sS https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-run.1.html | grep "Note: , the above sysctls are not allowed"

Note: , the above sysctls are not allowed.

Note: , the above sysctls are not allowed.

``` --- A wild guess, maybe the words `using` and `the` are interpreted as a variable names? The `if` syntax is explained here https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/dac8c35dd6fecdd1ea9bb4baf83f8600747fa875/docs/source/markdown/options/README.md?plain=1#L40-L42 ### Steps to reproduce the issue 1. Run command ``` $ curl -sS https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-run.1.html | grep "Note: , the above sysctls are not allowed"

Note: , the above sysctls are not allowed.

Note: , the above sysctls are not allowed.

``` ### Describe the results you received Text is missing between `:` and `,` ### Describe the results you expected Describe the results you expected ### podman info output ```yaml If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running. ``` ### Podman in a container No ### Privileged Or Rootless None ### Upstream Latest Release Yes ### Additional environment details Additional environment details ### Additional information Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
@jankaluza PTAL

IMO we should fix this before 6.0
